data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Substitution history tracking', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the existence or functionality of a substitution history tracking system. The absence of any concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to this requirement indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm its coverage.
gaps: No evidence of a substitution history tracking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
